title: armeria arctica var. californica
intro: Armeria arctica var. californica, also known as the mountain armeria, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the primrose family (Primulaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Armeria arctica var. californica include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
